Description:
A Blazor component for rendering and controlling Lottie animations using BodyMovin.
Remarks: The component provides a flexible way to integrate Lottie animations into Blazor applications. It supports various customization options, including animation source, playback settings, and event callbacks for animation lifecycle events.

Parameters.Name: Class
Parameters.Description: The CSS class name(s) to apply to the container.

Parameters.Name: Style
Parameters.Description: The inline CSS styles to apply to the component.

Parameters.Name: UserAttributes
Parameters.Description:
Sets a collection of user-defined HTML attributes represented as key-value pairs.
Remarks: This property is typically used to provide additional HTML attributes during rendering such as ARIA accessibility tags, data attributes, or any other custom HTML attributes that you want to apply to the component.

Parameters.Name: Src
Parameters.Description:
Gets or sets the source or relative URL for the component's content.
Remarks: *Required* e.g. Src="https://mudxtra.github.io/LottiePlayer/newAnimation.json" Src="./wwwroot/lottie/newAnimation.json"

Parameters.Name: AutoPlay
Parameters.Description: A value indicating whether the media should automatically start playing when loaded. If set to false, the media will not start playing until AnimationPaused is set to false.

Parameters.Name: Loop
Parameters.Description: Gets or sets whether the animation should loop.

Parameters.Name: LoopCount
Parameters.Description:
Gets or sets the number of times a loop should occur. Requires to be true.
Remarks: Default is 0 (infinite loop).

Parameters.Name: AnimationType
Parameters.Description:
Gets or sets the type of animation to be used for rendering the Lottie animation.
Remarks: Defaults to .

Parameters.Name: AnimationDirection
Parameters.Description:
Gets or sets the direction in which the Lottie animation plays.
Remarks: Defaults to . Changing this property after initialization will not change the playback direction of the animation, use

Parameters.Name: AnimationSpeed
Parameters.Description:
Gets or sets the speed of the animation.
Remarks: Defaults to 1.0 (normal speed). Changing this property after initialization will not change the speed of the animation, use

Parameters.Name: CurrentFrameChangeFunc
Parameters.Description:
Called when the current frame changes, with custom filtering logic
Remarks: The function receives the current frame number and should return true if the event should be raised. This allows for custom throttling logic (e.g., only every 10th frame, only on specific frames, etc.) Warning: Frame updates could happen as frequently as 30-60 times per second. Defaults to null. is only raised if something is attached to the handler. Example: frame => frame % 10 == 0 will raise the event every 10th frame.

Parameters.Name: CurrentFrameChanged
Parameters.Description: Called when the current frame changes (only when returns true)

Parameters.Name: DOMLoaded
Parameters.Description: Called when the Lottie player is initialized and the DOM is ready.

Parameters.Name: AnimationReady
Parameters.Description: Called when the animation is fully loaded and ready for playback.

Parameters.Name: AnimationLoopCompleted
Parameters.Description: Called when an animation loop completes.

Parameters.Name: AnimationOptions
Parameters.Description:
Additional Less Used Animation Options.
Remarks: Refer to for defaults.

PublicProperties.Name: LottiePlayerModule
PublicProperties.Description: The module used to control Lottie Player functionality.

PublicProperties.Name: TotalAnimationFrames
PublicProperties.Description: The total number of frames in the animation. This is set when the animation is loaded and ready for playback.

PublicProperties.Name: CurrentAnimationFrame
PublicProperties.Description: Gets the current animation frame as a double-precision value. This is updated during playback by the EventCallback of CurrentFrameChanged.

PublicProperties.Name: IsAnimationLoaded
PublicProperties.Description: Gets a value indicating whether the animation has been loaded and is ready for playback.

PublicProperties.Name: IsAnimationPaused
PublicProperties.Description: Gets a value indicating whether the animation is paused.

PublicProperties.Name: IsAnimationStopped
PublicProperties.Description: Gets a value indicating whether the animation is stopped.

PublicFields.Name: ElementId
PublicFields.Description: Represents the unique identifier for a Lottie element's surrounding div.

Methods.Name: PlayAnimationAsync
Methods.Description:
If the animation is not already playing, this method will start playing the animation.
Remarks: Should not be called before OnAfterRenderAsync.

Methods.Name: PauseAnimationAsync
Methods.Description:
Pauses the currently playing animation in the Lottie player.
Remarks: Should not be called before OnAfterRenderAsync.

Methods.Name: StopAnimationAsync
Methods.Description:
Stops the currently playing animation asynchronously.
Remarks: This method halts the animation playback if an animation is currently running. The method returns a boolean indicating whether the operation was successful.

Methods.Name: SetSpeedAsync
Methods.Description: Asynchronously sets the playback speed for the Lottie animation.

Methods.Name: SetDirectionAsync
Methods.Description: Sets the playback direction of the Lottie animation asynchronously.

Methods.Name: SetParametersAsync
Methods.Description: Override the SetParametersAsync method to handle component parameters.
